title: Cell Culture
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs a custom cell culture assay on up to 8 flat well plates. Please see [these instructions](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/37190e/opentrons_media_table.xlsx) for the exact transfer scheme. ---
steps_raw: This protocol performs a custom cell culture assay on up to 8 flat well plates. Please see [these instructions](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/37190e/opentrons_media_table.xlsx) for the exact transfer scheme. ---
Drug A is transferred to the bottom of all wells.
Drug B is transferred to the left of all wells.
Media is transferred to the right of all wells to bring to total volume of 100ul.
materials_raw: Opentrons 10 Tube Rack with NEST 4x50 mL, 6x15 mL Conical
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
Opentrons P20 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
